title: Thocky Keyboard Overlay
description: Makes breaking blocks and crops have a satisfying thocky keyboard sound. Replaces high pitch footstep sounds with more muted lower pitched ones.
body:
Makes breaking blocks and crops have a satisfying thocky keyboard sound. Replaces high pitch footstep sounds with more muted lower pitched ones.

I created this primarily to make farming crops in Hypixel Skyblock less annoying with sound on, certain crops had a very high pitch sound such as wheat, this replaces all of that with a nice satisfying thock. Also makes steps quiter, perfect for farming and mining in hypixel skyblock but can also be used for when placing blocks.
